columns.name: familyUnitName
columns.notes: Must match an existing FamilyUnit.Name in the DB. Case-insensitive lookup.

columns.name: dateOfBirth
columns.notes: Parsed with DateOnly.Parse(). Exact format depends on system locale, but ISO 8601 (yyyy-MM-dd) is safest.

columns.name: relationship
columns.notes: Enum.Parse with ignoreCase:true. Stored as varchar(20).

columns.name: documentNumber
columns.notes: API validator enforces ^[A-Z0-9]+$ but importer does NOT validate format.

columns.name: phone
columns.notes: API validator enforces E.164 format (^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$) but importer does NOT validate format.

constraints.notes: Composite uniqueness: (familyUnitId + firstName + lastName + dateOfBirth). The importer resolves familyUnitName to familyUnitId for this check.
